title: Ixora hispidula
taxonomy: Ixora hispidula is classified within the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This family consists of approximately 600 genera and over 13,000 species of flowering plants. The genus Ixora itself contains around 400 species, primarily found in tropical regions of Asia, Africa, and the Pacific Islands. Ixora hispidula is native to tropical Africa. Its classification also places it within the order Gentianales, which includes other flowering plants such as coffee and gardenias.
